p.strong: Step-by-step trace of provided buffer ring operation

div.p: Application submits RECV with buf_group = 1 No buffer address — kernel will select
Kernel removes buffer 17 from available pool DMA will write received data into this buffer

ol.li: Select: Kernel picks buffer 17 from ring
Return: buf_ring_add() + buf_ring_advance() Key: Buffer 17 is unavailable to other RECVs until returned!
